Frontend Engineer (React + TypeScript)
Apply for this job

Frontend Engineer (React + TypeScript)


Location: Remote (LATAM)

Salary: USD $4,500 - $6,000/month

Employment Type: Full-Time

Stage: Seed (Early-stage AI Startup)

Exclusive Opportunity: No


Company Overview

We are building an AI-powered platform that helps businesses automate complex operational workflows through intelligent software agents.

Our product combines artificial intelligence with intuitive user experiences, allowing customers to streamline repetitive tasks while improving efficiency and service quality.

Backed by leading startup investors, the team is small, highly collaborative, and focused on shipping exceptional products with speed and attention to detail.


The Challenge

We are looking for a Frontend Engineer who is passionate about building polished, high-quality product experiences.

This is not a feature factory role. You'll work closely with product and design to transform ideas and Figma designs into production-ready interfaces that feel fast, intuitive, and delightful to use.

You'll own the frontend experience from implementation to refinement, paying close attention to animations, interactions, accessibility, responsiveness, and every detail that contributes to an outstanding user experience.


Key Responsibilities

  • Build modern web applications using React and TypeScript.
  • Transform Figma designs into production-ready interfaces with high visual fidelity.
  • Create fast, responsive, and intuitive user experiences.
  • Implement motion design and polished UI animations using modern frontend technologies.
  • Build reusable components and scalable frontend architecture.
  • Collaborate closely with Product Designers to refine and improve user experiences.
  • Ensure excellent handling of loading states, empty states, error states, accessibility, and edge cases.
  • Continuously improve frontend performance, maintainability, and code quality.


Must Have

  • 5+ years of professional frontend engineering experience.
  • Strong production experience with React and TypeScript.
  • Experience with web animation libraries such as Framer Motion, GSAP, or similar.
  • Strong ability to convert Figma designs into production-quality applications.
  • Excellent attention to UI/UX details, including spacing, alignment, typography, and interactions.
  • Experience building reusable React components and scalable frontend architectures.
  • Conversational English with confidence participating in daily meetings.
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment.


Desired Skills

  • Experience building or maintaining a Design System or component library.
  • Experience refactoring or modernizing large React applications.
  • Strong knowledge of frontend performance optimization techniques.
  • Experience with frontend security and application reliability.
  • Previous experience working at a US-based startup.
  • Strong opinions about component architecture, scalability, and code reusability.


Soft Skills

  • Strong product mindset.
  • High attention to detail.
  • Ownership and accountability.
  • Ability to collaborate effectively with designers and engineers.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills.
  • Comfortable working with ambiguity and rapidly evolving product requirements.
  • Ability to execute quickly without compromising quality.


Benefits

  • Fully remote (LATAM).
  • Competitive salary paid in USD.
  • Opportunity to build AI-powered products used by global customers.
  • Small, highly collaborative engineering team.
  • High ownership and direct impact on the product.
  • Fast-growing early-stage startup environment.
  • Opportunity to influence product direction and frontend architecture from an early stage.


Hiring Process

  • AI Technical Assessment
  • Interview with the CTO
  • Paid Work Trial
  • Offer
